creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.7.2006092721/jpilot-0.99.9.log show that jpilot on install add 2 locales which are not listed in the port files list. This patch resolve a problem.

How-To-Repeat: 

see http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.7.2006092721/jpilot-0.99.9.log
